prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: Transmitter installation is observed during operation after the reported concern was checked. Readings are steady, no abnormal sound or heat is noted, and the maintenance log shows the standard functional check was completed with no open punch note. Reference material on hand: API RP 551, mfr manuals.
title: Fault diagnosis: Transmitter installation (industrial site)
